regulatory_context.value: Article 4 already applies to providers and deployers from 2 February 2025, and supervision/enforcement starts in August 2026.

training_support_route.value: Luxembourg company-training co-funding exists, and Fit 4 AI publicly covers the assessment/roadmap phase at 50% consultancy cost coverage; neither source proves this exact workshop is eligible.

market_adoption_stat.value: Luxembourg recorded 14.4% enterprise AI use in 2023.

target_audience_summary.value: Luxembourg employers deploying or allowing AI tools, especially HR/L&D and compliance-adjacent stakeholders.
target_audience_summary.omission_reason: Useful synthesis from verified context, but still partly inferential for the exact offer.

commercial_pricing_context.value: Visible Luxembourg competitor prices for short AI courses cluster around 175-180 EUR.
commercial_pricing_context.omission_reason: Useful context only; it does not establish a safe price or revenue model for A1.

product_certificate_significance.omission_reason: No public authority or buyer-side source was found proving external compliance significance for the workshop certificate.

audit_documentation_sufficiency.omission_reason: No regulator or programme source confirms that the workshop documentation is sufficient for compliance or audit use.

product_specific_ai_package_eligibility.omission_reason: Public support routes exist, but the exact workshop-level eligibility claim was not proven.

exclusive_market_gap_claim.omission_reason: The exclusivity story was contradicted by public Luxembourg competitor pages.
